block_00: Measuring Asset Risk with the Ulcer Index
block_01: In trading, the higher the risk, the higher the potential return. On the other hand, more risk can also mean greater losses. That is why it is important for traders to know how to accurately estimate risk and decide how much is too much.
block_02: Fortunately, there is an indicator that helps measure the risk of different assets: the Ulcer Index. Simple to use, it has the potential to change the way you trade for the better.
block_04: Guide to Setting Goals in Trading
block_05: Goals help us improve in many professional fields, and trading is no exception. The key to success is learning how to set goals the proper way.
block_07: How to Learn Almost Everything About the Asset?
block_08: Market news, technical analysis, traders’ sentiment — we’ve gathered it all in one place so you don’t have to. Learn about the in-depth asset viewer feature and use it to your advantage.
